.editorconfig.general_idea: Refactor .editorconfig to use a glob pattern for web-related files instead of relying on global defaults.
.editorconfig.before:
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

[{package,bower}.json]
indent_size = 2
.editorconfig.after:
# We recommend you to keep these unchanged
end_of_line = lf
charset = utf-8
trim_trailing_whitespace = true
insert_final_newline = true

# Change these settings to your own preference
indent_style = space
indent_size = 4

[*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}]
indent_size = 2

[*.md]
trim_trailing_whitespace = false

package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to a version compatible with modern tooling and JDK 11+ build environments.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern npm packages and may fail to run the updated build scripts or dependencies.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build system with Angular CLI and Webpack for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is removed and replaced by Angular CLI; without this change, the build scripts would fail as Grunt is no longer present.

package.json.general_idea: Remove obsolete Grunt dependencies and plugins.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is no longer used; keeping these dependencies would be redundant and potentially cause conflicts or security issues.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular framework dependencies for the new frontend architecture.
package.json.why_exists: The application now uses Angular; without these dependencies, the frontend code will not compile or run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and related build tools for frontend development.
package.json.why_exists: Angular CLI is required to build and serve the Angular application; without it, the build process fails.

package.json.general_idea: Add Jest as the new testing framework for frontend unit tests.
package.json.why_exists: Karma/Jasmine is replaced by Jest; without Jest, the test suite cannot run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Webpack and related plugins for module bundling.
package.json.why_exists: Webpack is now the bundler; without it, the frontend assets cannot be compiled.

package.json.general_idea: Add ESLint and Prettier for code linting and formatting.
package.json.why_exists: These tools are integrated into the build process; without them, linting checks may fail or be skipped.

package.json.general_idea: Add Protractor and WebDriver Manager for end-to-end testing.
package.json.why_exists: E2E tests rely on Protractor; without these dependencies, E2E tests cannot run.

package.json.general_idea: Update JHipster generator to a version compatible with JDK 11 and Angular.
package.json.why_exists: Older JHipster versions may not support JDK 11 or the new Angular stack; updating ensures compatibility.

package.json.general_idea: Add Docker Compose scripts for database and service management.
package.json.why_exists: These scripts are used in CI/CD pipelines; without them, automated testing and deployment may fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add Maven-based backend build scripts for CI/CD integration.
package.json.why_exists: These scripts are used in CI pipelines; without them, backend builds and tests may fail in automated environments.

package.json.general_idea: Add configuration for backend port, default environment, and packaging type.
package.json.why_exists: These configurations are used by build scripts; without them, scripts may fail due to missing variables.

package.json.general_idea: Add Jest SonarQube reporter configuration for test reporting.
package.json.why_exists: This configuration is used for integrating test results with SonarQube; without it, reporting may fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add cache directories configuration for npm.
package.json.why_exists: This optimizes npm install performance; without it, builds may be slower but not fail.

package.json.general_idea: Update application name and version to reflect the new project identity.
package.json.why_exists: This is a cosmetic change to align with the new project structure; it does not affect compilation or runtime.

package.json.general_idea: Add license field to package.json.
package.json.why_exists: This is a metadata addition; it does not affect compilation or runtime.

package.json.general_idea: Remove obsolete testing dependencies like Karma, Jasmine, and PhantomJS.
package.json.why_exists: These are replaced by Jest and Protractor; keeping them is redundant and may cause conflicts.

package.json.general_idea: Remove obsolete utility dependencies like lodash, xml2js, and yo.
package.json.why_exists: These are no longer used in the new build system; keeping them is redundant.

package.json.general_idea: Add TypeScript and related tooling for Angular development.
package.json.why_exists: Angular uses TypeScript; without these dependencies, the frontend code will not compile.

package.json.general_idea: Add Bootstrap and FontAwesome for UI styling.
package.json.why_exists: These are required for the frontend UI; without them, the application may look broken or fail to load styles.

package.json.general_idea: Add RxJS for reactive programming in Angular.
package.json.why_exists: Angular relies on RxJS; without it, the application will not function correctly.

package.json.general_idea: Add Zone.js for Angular change detection.
package.json.why_exists: Angular requires Zone.js for change detection; without it, the application will not work.

package.json.general_idea: Add tslib for TypeScript library support.
package.json.why_exists: TypeScript and Angular dependencies require tslib; without it, compilation may fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add Swagger UI distribution for API documentation.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for API docs; without it, the docs page may not load, but it's not critical for compilation.

package.json.general_idea: Add dayjs for date handling.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in the frontend; without it, date-related features may fail, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add ngx-infinite-scroll and ngx-webstorage for Angular features.
package.json.why_exists: These are used in the frontend; without them, specific features may fail, but they are not build blockers.

package.json.general_idea: Add @ng-bootstrap for Angular Bootstrap components.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for UI components; without it, the UI may be broken, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add @fortawesome/angular-fontawesome for icons.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for icons; without it, icons may not display, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add @angular/localize for internationalization support.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for i18n; without it, i18n features may not work, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add @angular/service-worker for PWA support.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for PWA; without it, PWA features may not work, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli for API code generation.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for generating API clients; without it, code generation may fail, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add @angular-builders/custom-webpack and @angular-builders/jest for custom builds.
package.json.why_exists: These are used for customizing the build process; without them, custom builds may fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add @angular-eslint/eslint-plugin for Angular-specific linting.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for linting Angular code; without it, linting may be incomplete, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin and parser for TypeScript linting.
package.json.why_exists: These are used for linting TypeScript code; without them, linting may be incomplete, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add browser-sync and browser-sync-webpack-plugin for live reloading.
package.json.why_exists: These are used for development; without them, live reloading may not work, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add chai and related libraries for testing assertions.
package.json.why_exists: These are used in tests; without them, tests may fail, but they are not build blockers.

package.json.general_idea: Add concurrently for running multiple scripts in parallel.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in build scripts; without it, scripts may fail to run in parallel.

package.json.general_idea: Add copy-webpack-plugin for copying assets during build.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in the build process; without it, assets may not be copied correctly.

package.json.general_idea: Add eslint-config-prettier to disable conflicting ESLint rules.
package.json.why_exists: This ensures Prettier and ESLint work together; without it, linting may fail or produce errors.

package.json.general_idea: Add eslint-webpack-plugin for integrating ESLint into Webpack.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in the build process; without it, linting may not be integrated into the build.

package.json.general_idea: Add friendly-errors-webpack-plugin for better error messages.
package.json.why_exists: This improves developer experience; without it, errors may be harder to read, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add husky and lint-staged for pre-commit hooks.
package.json.why_exists: These are used for enforcing code quality; without them, hooks may not run, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add jest-date-mock, jest-junit, and jest-sonar-reporter for testing utilities.
package.json.why_exists: These are used in tests; without them, specific test features may fail, but they are not build blockers.

package.json.general_idea: Add mocha for additional testing support.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in tests; without it, some tests may fail, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add prettier-plugin-java for formatting Java files.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for formatting; without it, Java files may not be formatted, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add rimraf for cleaning directories.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in build scripts; without it, cleaning may fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add simple-progress-webpack-plugin for build progress reporting.
package.json.why_exists: This improves developer experience; without it, progress may not be shown, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add ts-node for running TypeScript files directly.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in development; without it, running TS files directly may fail, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add wait-on for waiting on services during CI/CD.
package.json.why_exists: This is used in CI scripts; without it, scripts may fail to wait for services.

package.json.general_idea: Add webdriver-manager for managing WebDriver binaries.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for E2E tests; without it, E2E tests may fail to run.

package.json.general_idea: Add webpack-bundle-analyzer for analyzing bundle size.
package.json.why_exists: This is used for optimization; without it, analysis may not be available, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add webpack-notifier for build notifications.
package.json.why_exists: This improves developer experience; without it, notifications may not appear, but it's not a build blocker.

package.json.general_idea: Add @types/chai, @types/chai-string, @types/jest, @types/mocha, @types/node, @types/selenium-webdriver for TypeScript definitions.
package.json.why_exists: These are required for TypeScript compilation; without them, type errors may occur.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to use annotationProcessorPaths for MapStruct and Hibernate JPA metamodel generation, replacing the deprecated maven-processor-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The maven-processor-plugin is deprecated and incompatible with modern annotation processing standards; without this change, annotation processors like MapStruct and Hibernate JPA metamodel generator will not execute correctly during compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Liquibase plugin dependencies to use liquibase-hibernate5 instead of liquibase-hibernate4 to support JPA 2.1+ and Hibernate 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: liquibase-hibernate4 is incompatible with Hibernate 5 and JPA 2.1+ APIs used in JDK 11/Spring Boot 2.x environments, causing runtime errors during schema generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation validation-api dependency to Liquibase plugin dependencies to satisfy JPA/Hibernate validation requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate 5 and JPA 2.1+ require the validation-api on the classpath for schema generation; missing this dependency causes NoClassDefFoundError or similar runtime failures during Liquibase execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-tomcat exclusion in spring-boot-starter-test with junit-vintage-engine exclusion to align with JUnit 5 testing framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses JUnit 5 by default; excluding tomcat is no longer the primary concern, and junit-vintage-engine should be excluded to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5 engine.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add archunit-junit5-api and archunit-junit5-engine dependencies for architectural testing with JUnit 5.
Add spring-security-test dependency for security testing support.
Add micrometer-registry-prometheus and metrics-core dependencies for modern metrics reporting.
Remove Spring Cloud connectors (cloudfoundry, spring-service, localconfig) as they are deprecated in favor of Spring Cloud Connectors or Cloud Foundry specific starters.
Add problem-spring-web dependency for standardized HTTP problem details responses.
Update maven-enforcer-plugin to enforce Java version range [1.8,16) instead of a single version, supporting JDK 8 to 15.
Add jib-maven-plugin for container image building, configured with adoptopenjdk:11-jre-hotspot base image.
Add maven-checkstyle-plugin with nohttp-checkstyle dependency for code style enforcement.
Add maven-javadoc-plugin configuration to generate Java documentation.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin for integration test execution.
Add maven-idea-plugin for IntelliJ IDEA project generation.
Add maven-resources-plugin configuration for resource filtering with custom delimiters.
Add properties-maven-plugin for reading sonar-project.properties.
Add git-commit-id-plugin for generating git commit information properties.
Update jacoco-maven-plugin configuration to separate unit and integration test coverage reports.
Update maven-war-plugin configuration to exclude web.xml requirement and configure static resources.
Add frontend-maven-plugin for managing frontend build tools.
Update maven-surefire-plugin configuration to exclude integration tests and set reports directory.
Remove maven-sortpom-plugin as it is no longer required for project maintenance.
Remove gatling-maven-plugin as it is no longer part of the project.
Remove maven-eclipse-plugin configuration as it is no longer needed.
Remove maven-enforcer-plugin configuration details as they are moved to pluginManagement.
Remove spring-boot-maven-plugin configuration details as they are no longer needed.
Remove liquibase-maven-plugin configuration details as they are moved to pluginManagement.
Remove sonar-maven-plugin from plugins section as it is no longer directly configured.
Add sonar-maven-plugin to pluginManagement section with updated groupId.
Add maven-clean-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add maven-war-plugin to pluginManagement section with updated configuration.
Add maven-compiler-plugin to pluginManagement section with annotation processor paths.
Add maven-javadoc-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add maven-checkstyle-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add maven-idea-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add maven-resources-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add maven-surefire-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add jacoco-maven-plugin to pluginManagement section with updated configuration.
Add jib-maven-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add liquibase-maven-plugin to pluginManagement section with updated configuration.
Add maven-enforcer-plugin to pluginManagement section with updated configuration.
Add maven-eclipse-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add properties-maven-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add git-commit-id-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Add maven-clean-plugin to pluginManagement section.
Replace the deprecated Tomcat starter with the Undertow starter in the production profile to align with JHipster's default embedded server choice.
Remove the legacy Yeoman Maven plugin used for Grunt-based frontend builds, as JHipster migrated to Webpack.
Add the Frontend Maven Plugin to manage Node.js, npm, and Webpack builds within the Maven lifecycle.
Update the maven-clean-plugin configuration to clean the new static assets directory structure used by Webpack.
Add the Git Commit ID Plugin to the production build to embed version information into the application.
Add the Spring Boot build-info goal to generate Actuator build properties during the production build.
Add the Failsafe plugin configuration to support integration testing with Spring Boot repackaged jars.
Add the Sonar Maven Plugin to enable static code analysis integration.
Add the Spring Boot Maven Plugin configuration with repackage goal and main class definition.
Refactor Maven profiles to separate concerns (dev, prod, webpack, tls, etc.) and update default activation.
Add the H2 database dependency to the dev profile for in-memory development database support.
Add Spring Boot DevTools dependency to the dev profile for enhanced development experience.
Add the WAR profile to support building the application as a WAR file for external servlet containers.
Add the IDE profile to include MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator dependencies for IDE compatibility.
Add the Eclipse profile to configure m2e lifecycle mapping and ignore specific plugin executions.
Add the E2E profile to configure the build for end-to-end testing.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot 1.x datasource configuration to Spring Boot 2.x HikariCP standard properties.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed support for Tomcat JDBC pool properties and requires explicit HikariCP configuration or standard datasource properties; the old 'dataSourceClassName' and nested 'databaseName' structure is invalid in Boot 2.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
datasource:
        dataSourceClassName: org.h2.jdbcx.JdbcDataSource
        url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipster;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1
        databaseName: 
        serverName: 
        username: 
        password:
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
datasource:
    type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:jhipsternoi18nsampleapplication;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE
    username: jhipsterNoI18nSampleApplication
    password:
    hikari:
      poolName: Hikari
      auto-commit: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update JPA/Hibernate configuration to use Spring Boot 2.x property names and remove deprecated settings.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changed JPA property prefixes (e.g., 'openInView' to 'open-in-view') and removed support for 'naming-strategy' in favor of 'implicit-naming-strategy' or 'physical-naming-strategy'; 'database' property is also removed.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
jpa:
        database-platform: com.mycompany.myapp.domain.util.FixedH2Dialect
        database: H2
        openInView: false
        show_sql: true
        generate-ddl: false
        hibernate:
            ddl-auto: none
            naming-strategy: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Remove Spring Boot 1.x specific cache and metrics configuration blocks.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the 'metrics' namespace (replaced by Micrometer) and changed cache configuration structure; the old 'metrics' and 'cache' blocks are invalid or ignored in Boot 2.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 9999
    graphite:
        enabled: false
        host: localhost
        port: 2003
        prefix: jhipster

cache:
    timeToLiveSeconds: 3600
    ehcache:
        maxBytesLocalHeap: 16M

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add JHipster-specific configuration properties required by the newer framework version.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: The newer JHipster version expects specific 'jhipster' namespace properties for cache, CORS, security, and logging; missing these may cause runtime configuration errors or missing features.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
jhipster:
  cache: # Cache configuration
    ehcache: # Ehcache configuration
      time-to-live-seconds: 3600 # By default objects stay 1 hour in the cache
      max-entries: 100 # Number of objects in each cache entry
  # CORS is only enabled by default with the "dev" profile, so BrowserSync can access the API
  cors:
    allowed-origins: '*'
    allowed-methods: '*'
    allowed-headers: '*'
    exposed-headers: 'Link,X-Total-Count'
    allow-credentials: true
    max-age: 1800
  security:
    remember-me:
      # security key (this key should be unique for your application, and kept secret)
      key: 62227d4d159c4e6f364fe22307707385fd773e55
  mail: # specific JHipster mail property, for standard properties see MailProperties
    base-url: http://127.0.0.1:8080
  logging:
    use-json-format: false # By default, logs are not in Json format
    logstash: # Forward logs to logstash over a socket, used by LoggingConfiguration
      enabled: false
      host: localhost
      port: 5000
      queue-size: 512

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot 2.x standard properties for logging, devtools, and mail.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changed property names (e.g., 'cache-seconds' to 'cache-duration', 'mode' to 'mode' but under different structure) and added new devtools/mailer configurations; old names are ignored.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
messages:
        cache-seconds: 1
    thymeleaf:
        mode: XHTML
        cache: false
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
messages:
    cache-duration: PT1S # 1 second, see the ISO 8601 standard
  thymeleaf:
    cache: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add Liquibase context configuration for the new JHipster version.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: The new JHipster version expects specific Liquibase contexts ('dev, faker') to load sample data; missing this may result in empty database or migration errors.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
liquibase:
    # Remove 'faker' if you do not want the sample data to be loaded automatically
    contexts: dev, faker

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions, causing runtime ClassNotFound or initialization errors.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update MySQL JDBC URL to include timezone and SSL parameters required by newer drivers.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Newer MySQL Connector/J versions require explicit serverTimezone and useSSL settings to avoid runtime warnings or connection failures.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated Hibernate naming strategy with standard JPA configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy is removed in Hibernate 5.2+ (used in Spring Boot 2.x/JDK 11), causing startup failure.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to the non-deprecated class name.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect is deprecated/removed in newer Hibernate versions, causing startup errors.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace deprecated EhCache region factory with standard JCache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cache.ehcache.SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory is removed in Hibernate 5.2+, causing startup failure.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Remove legacy metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite) replaced by Micrometer.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Legacy metrics dependencies are removed in Spring Boot 2.x, causing compile errors if referenced in code or config.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf mode from XHTML to HTML5.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: XHTML mode is deprecated/removed in newer Thymeleaf versions, causing template parsing errors.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Spring Boot Actuator configuration from legacy 1.x properties to 2.x hierarchical structure.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `endpoints.*` properties; using them causes configuration binding failures or ignored settings in the new Actuator API.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task executor configuration from custom flat properties to Spring Boot 2.x standard `spring.task.execution` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for `ThreadPoolTaskExecutor` binds to `spring.task.execution.*`; the old custom `async.*` properties are no longer recognized by the framework's auto-configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-no-i-18-n-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom flat properties to Spring Boot 2.x standard `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x `JavaMailSender` auto-configuration binds to `spring.mail.*`; the old custom `mail.*` properties are ignored, leading to unconfigured mail services.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration from custom flat properties to JHipster-specific `jhipster.api-docs` properties compatible with Springfox 2.x/3.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The old `swagger.*` properties were likely bound to a custom configuration class that was refactored or removed in the JHipster upgrade; the new structure aligns with the updated `SwaggerProperties` or equivalent in the newer JHipster version.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterNoI18nSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterNoI18nSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot 2.x JPA and Hibernate configuration properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes default behaviors for JPA (e.g., `open-in-view` defaults to false, new generator mappings); explicit configuration is required to maintain expected application behavior and performance.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  data:
    jpa:
      repositories:
        bootstrap-mode: deferred
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate.jdbc.time_zone: UTC
      hibernate.id.new_generator_mappings: true
      hibernate.connection.provider_disables_autocommit: true
      hibernate.cache.use_second_level_cache: true
      hibernate.cache.use_query_cache: false
      hibernate.generate_statistics: false
      hibernate.jdbc.batch_size: 25
      hibernate.order_inserts: true
      hibernate.order_updates: true
      hibernate.query.fail_on_pagination_over_collection_fetch: true
      hibernate.query.in_clause_parameter_padding: true
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: none
      naming:
        physical-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringPhysicalNamingStrategy
        implicit-strategy: org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.hibernate.SpringImplicitNamingStrategy

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x management metrics and health probe configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x introduces new metrics backends (Micrometer) and Kubernetes-style health probes; configuration is needed to enable and expose these features correctly.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  info:
    git:
      mode: full
  health:
    group:
      liveness:
        include: livenessState
      readiness:
        include: readinessState,datasource
    probes:
      enabled: true
    mail:
      enabled: false
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: true
        step: 60
    enable:
      http: true
      jvm: true
      logback: true
      process: true
      system: true
    distribution:
      percentiles-histogram:
        all: true
      percentiles:
        all: 0, 0.5, 0.75, 0.95, 0.99, 1.0
    tags:
      application: ${spring.application.name}
    web:
      server:
        request:
          autotime:
            enabled: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x server servlet session configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x moves session configuration under `server.servlet.session.*`; explicit configuration ensures security best practices (http-only cookies) are maintained.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
server:
  servlet:
    session:
      cookie:
        http-only: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add JHipster-specific application properties for client app name and info ribbon.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: JHipster 6.x+ expects specific properties under `jhipster.clientApp` and `info.display-ribbon-on-profiles` for frontend integration and dev environment indicators.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x application name and profile activation configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x uses `spring.application.name` for various integrations (e.g., Actuator, Micrometer); explicit profile activation configuration is standard in JHipster 6+.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  application:
    name: jhipsterNoI18nSampleApplication
  profiles:
    active: #spring.profiles.active#

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x Thymeleaf and output ANSI configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting Thymeleaf mode and ANSI console availability ensures consistent behavior across different environments in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  thymeleaf:
    mode: HTML
  output:
    ansi:
      console-available: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x JMX and bean overriding configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x disables JMX by default and restricts bean definition overriding; explicit configuration is required if these features are needed or to suppress warnings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  jmx:
    enabled: false
  main:
    allow-bean-definition-overriding: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x scheduling task configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x auto-configuration for `ThreadPoolTaskScheduler` binds to `spring.task.scheduling.*`; explicit configuration ensures proper thread pool sizing for scheduled tasks.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    scheduling:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-no-i-18-n-sample-application-scheduling-
      pool:
        size: 2

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 2.x message source configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Explicitly setting the message basename ensures internationalization resources are loaded correctly in Spring Boot 2.x.
